assistant.title: Chat with Nexus
assistant.empty: Ask about health, cost, traffic, or routing.
assistant.confirmProd: This is a PRODUCTION environment — proceed with caution.
assistant.confirmSecondStep: Production write — confirm once more to execute.
assistant.confirmExpired: The confirmation expired or was already answered — the action did not run. Re-issue it to try again.
assistant.confirmMisrouted: This conversation is being handled by another server instance — the action did not run. Please try again.
assistant.confirmReissue: The assistant restarted before this action completed — it did not run. Please re-issue it.

slash.help: Commands: /help — this list · /clear or /new — start a fresh conversation

assistant.compacted: Older turns in this conversation were condensed to fit the context window.
assistant.fileExpired: This file is no longer available (it may have expired).
assistant.integrityWarning: This conversation's integrity check did not pass — its stored history may have been altered.

forgotPasswordPageSubtitle: How to regain access to your account
forgotPasswordInstructions: This dashboard does not offer self-service password reset. Contact a super administrator to reset your Nexus Gateway user password, or follow your organization’s identity and access management process.
invalidCredentials: Invalid username or password. Please try again.

loginHero.headline: Govern every AI request in your enterprise.
loginHero.point1: Compliance, DLP, and audit across providers
loginHero.point2: Multi-provider routing with cost and quota controls
loginHero.point3: Real-time visibility into traffic, cost, and safety

loginErrors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
loginErrors.userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact a super administrator.
loginErrors.authctxExpired: Your sign-in session expired. Refreshing the page…
loginErrors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
loginErrors.internalError: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.
loginErrors.loadProvidersFailed: Unable to load sign-in methods. Refresh the page to retry.
loginErrors.ssoFailed: Sign-in via the identity provider failed ({{code}}). Check the provider configuration or try again; an administrator can find the details in the server logs.

methodPickerHint: Choose how you want to sign in.
applicationErrorMessage: The application encountered an unexpected error. Try refreshing the page.
pageErrorMessage: This page encountered an error. You can try again or navigate to a different page.
accessDeniedMessage: You don't have permission to access this page.
forbiddenSection: You don't have permission to view this.
pageNotFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
sessionExpiringSoon: You'll be signed out soon due to inactivity. Interact with the page to stay signed in.
name: Name

providerModelPicker.noModelsForProvider: No models configured for this provider

validation.configMustBeObject: Config must be a JSON object
validation.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least {{count}} characters
